questions.question: Describe the difference between a recursive and iterative approach to traversing a binary tree. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Explain the time and space complexity of each approach

questions.question: What is the time complexity of inserting a new node into a binary search tree, and how would you implement this operation?
questions.hint: Consider the average and worst-case scenarios

questions.question: A binary tree is represented as an array where the parent-child relationships are stored in the indices. If the root node is at index 0 and the left child of a node at index i is at index 2*i + 1, what is the index of the left child of a node at index 10?
questions.hint: Use the given array representation to calculate the index
